title: Project Miner Local Approval Decision Draft Disclosure Controls
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM workbench scan burden by wrapping only the existing /pm-review/import-intake Local approval decision draft panel in a browser-native, default-open disclosure control while preserving its placement inside Approval Prep Detail after Local Review Checklist, aria label, decision selector, review notes textarea, local-only attestation, clear button, existing candidate-scoped storage key, export inclusion, dynamic derived-state behavior, no-storage behavior, no-authority wording, read seams, and no-authority boundary.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Usability Implementer
implemented_scope: Convert the existing Local approval decision draft panel wrapper to a native default-open disclosure control.
Preserve the Local approval decision draft aria label.
Keep the panel inside Approval Prep Detail after Local Review Checklist.

Preserve the existing decision selector, review notes textarea, local-only attestation, clear button, existing candidate-scoped storage key, export inclusion, dynamic derived-state behavior, no-storage behavior, and no-authority wording.

Preserve existing storage behavior, read seams, route links, quick-jump rail, output actions, output statuses, helper disclosures, detail disclosures, handoff-guide disclosure, workflow-map disclosure, open-items disclosure, snapshot disclosure, operating-queue disclosure, import-exception-register disclosure, workflow-gates disclosure, exception/decision detail disclosure, admission/approval contract disclosure, and local-review-checklist disclosure.

Add focused smoke coverage proving default-open state, collapse/reopen behavior, hidden/visible decision draft controls, three draft-control labels, no disclosure-state localStorage keys, unchanged disabled/enabled clear button behavior, unchanged draft selection/notes/attestation behavior, and continued PM Lane 083 authority guard posture.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
sidecar_result: A read-only sidecar from PM Lane 099 recommended PM Lane 100 as Project Miner Local Approval Decision Draft Disclosure Controls. The recommendation was accepted as a browser-local AI/orchestration approval-draft ergonomics slice. A separate read-only PM Lane 101 scout completed during this tranche and recommended Project Miner Local Executor Closeout Intake Disclosure Controls as the next tiny non-overlapping lane. The scout made no edits, staged nothing, ran no validation, and did not touch Supabase, Render, Vercel, Olares, or macros.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page Local approval decision draft panel wrapper markup.
Modify focused operations-web smoke tests for default-open local-approval-decision-draft disclosure controls and no persisted collapse state.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No review notes textarea behavior change.
No candidate-scoped approval draft storage key change.
No approval draft export inclusion change.
No approval draft dynamic derived-state behavior change.
No admission and approval contract change.
No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
